creator: m.tsatsenko@gmail.com
text:
Now I see.
But we can not just drop apache dependency. Before doing that we
should at least:
1) Add fastcgi deps as an alternative (option Apache/fastcgi)
2) In case of fastcgi provide rc script for launching otrs fastcgi
process on boot
3) In case of fastcgi provide an example config for nginx/lightttpd webserver.


-- 
Mikhail
